proposal1.heroHeadline: Tiny is burning $15,000 a year on manual proposal creation. Here's where the time goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, crafting a proposal takes hours away from your core services. With our AI, generate complete, branded proposals in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each issue below is a direct hit to Tiny's efficiency and profitability.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Eva spends 10 hours a week on proposals. That's 520 hours a year not spent on client strategy or media selection.

problems.title: Lost Deals
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean lost opportunities. Every day a proposal is late, the client's interest wanes, costing potential deals.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Manual creation leads to branding errors. Each mistake can cost up to $500 in client corrections and damages trust.

problems.title: High Labor Cost
problems.description: Paying $30/hour for proposal work totals $15,600 annually. This is money not reinvested in business growth or innovation.

problems.title: Missed Insights
problems.description: Without data analysis, proposals lack depth. Missing insights can mean a loss of $2,000 per deal due to less competitive offers.

problems.title: Stress and Burnout
problems.description: Constant manual effort leads to burnout. Overworked teams can reduce efficiency by 20%, impacting overall service quality.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Introducing our AI system, the antidote to Tiny's bleeding resources.

solutions.title: Instant Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposal creation is a manual marathon. Our AI system completes it in 47 seconds, freeing up valuable time.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual proposals risk brand inconsistency. Our system ensures every proposal is on-brand, every time.

solutions.title: Cost Efficiency
solutions.description: High labor costs eat into profits. Our automated system reduces these costs significantly, reallocating funds to growth.

solutions.title: Data-Driven Insights
solutions.description: Proposals lack depth without data. Our system integrates insights automatically, making proposals smarter and more competitive.

solutions.title: Enhanced Focus
solutions.description: Manual tasks distract from core services. With automation, focus shifts back to strategy and media selection, enhancing service quality.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Tiny's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Tiny around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Tiny.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Reach with Targeted Strategies
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We're committed to enhancing your market presence through strategic planning and precise execution.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently facing several losses due to ineffective marketing strategies.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves your site without converting is revenue walking out the door. This leads to an estimated 15% monthly loss in potential sales.

problems.title: Ineffective Ad Spend
problems.description: Wasted ad spend is costing Acme Corp approximately 20% of its marketing budget each month, reducing overall profitability.

problems.title: Poor Brand Visibility
problems.description: Limited brand recognition in your target market is causing a 25% loss in potential customer engagement monthly.

problems.title: Weak Social Media Presence
problems.description: Inconsistent social media strategies result in a 30% decrease in audience interaction and brand loyalty.

problems.title: Inefficient Communication
problems.description: Unclear messaging leads to customer confusion, resulting in a 10% drop in user retention and satisfaction.

problems.title: Missed Market Opportunities
problems.description: Lack of market analysis is causing missed opportunities, with an approximate 18% loss in potential market share annually.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Tiny offers tailored solutions to address these specific challenges and improve Acme Corp's outcomes.

solutions.title: Strategic Planning
solutions.description: We create a customized roadmap to boost conversions and streamline marketing efforts.

solutions.title: Compelling Communications
solutions.description: Our team crafts clear, impactful messaging to enhance customer understanding and retention.

solutions.title: Media Selection
solutions.description: We identify the most effective media channels to maximize your advertising ROI.

solutions.title: Social Media Management
solutions.description: We boost your online presence with engaging and consistent social media strategies.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Tiny is your partner for effective and economical marketing solutions.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Success
whyUsCards.description: Our track record of increasing client KPIs speaks for itself.

whyUsCards.title: Timely Execution

whyUsCards.title: Attention to Detail

whyUsCards.title: Client Focused
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize your needs and work closely to meet your business goals.

proposal2.ctaHeadline: Ready to Elevate Your Marketing Strategy?
proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's discuss how Tiny can help transform your business. No commitment required.

lead.company_description:
Tiny is a group of experienced design and marketing professionals who realize you don't have to be large to be great. In fact, some of 
the smallest ideas have made the biggest impact on the way people think, behave, work and live. Take Post-it notes, microchips, contact lenses, cell phones, Altoids. 

As a full-service advertising and design firm, Tiny applies big-idea thinking to the development of successful marketing solutions. The truth is, effective marketing doesn't necessarily require large budgets, a huge staff and lots of overhead to be great. It takes a core team of highly experienced and knowledgeable people who understand your business, your industry and your customers. That's what we do. 
That's who we are.
lead.headline: Owner, Tiny Advertising & Design
lead.company_technologies: cloudflare hosting, elasticemail, google font api, google tag manager, mobile friendly, outlook, wordpress.org
lead.company_full_address: 4646 E Greenway Rd, #112, Phoenix, Arizona 85032, US
lead.keywords: public relations, luxury goods marketing, strategic planning, brand strategy development, digital marketing, marketing plan development & implementation, real estate marketing, web development, content development, advertising services, marketing & advertising, information technology & services
lead.personalization: You guys are flipping the script on marketing budgets with your small team approach.
